dialogueItems.name: Story
dialogueItems.text: Merzp, now close to the peak, receives a transmission request from Aldrich

dialogueItems.name: Aldrich Through the Comms Device
dialogueItems.text: <i>Merzp, you going to need to find a way to reach us. The only clear landing site was on some flat rock formation here, you need to find a way to get up to us. Is there anything around you to use to get up to the ship, over.

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: Yes, there is commander, I can use these rocks that are rather sticky as a way to make a ladder for me, over.

dialogueItems.name: Aldrich Through the Comms Device
dialogueItems.text: Great! Use those to reach us then. Over and out.

dialogueItems.name: Merzp
dialogueItems.text: More of those things, I should avoid them. Especially those bigger glorpnods who seem different from the rest.
